titles.title: Sing, Sing, Sing, Sing, Sing and Pray

authors.author: Arno Backhaus
Arno Backhaus
Sing and pray (Ich schau in mein Leben)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v5 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sing, sing, sing, sing, sing and pray (3x) oh what a wonderful day!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I look into my life and I have to say: sing and pray, sing and pray. Jesus take my troubles away! sing and pray, sing and pray.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I go to Jesus every day: sing and pray, sing and pray. I ask for joy and he says: OK! sing and pray, sing and pray.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I say: My Lord, I want to obey.. sing and pray, sing and pray. b’cause I’m blind, I can’t see the way… sing and pray, sing and pray.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I say: “Hey Jesus, make my day!” sing and pray, sing and pray. He says: Allright, this is the way…. sing and pray, sing and pray.
